title: IBM Research: Regression-like Loss on Number Tokens
description: Number Token Loss (NTL): token-level regression for improved numerical reasoning in language models with zero runtime overhead.
keywords: Numerical Reasoning, Language Models, Token-Level Regression

title:
MIT: Reaction Graph Networks for Synthesis
Condition Prediction
description: Reaction Graph Network (RGN) for predicting solid-state synthesis conditions, accelerating materials discovery.
keywords: Graph Neural Networks, Synthesis Prediction, Materials Science

title: Helmholtz Zentrum: Cell Embeddings & Dendrite Segmentation
description: DINOv3-based cell embeddings with unsupervised subclusters; PSPA-based neuron and dendrite segmentation in brightfield confocal microscopy.
keywords: Self-Supervised Learning, Cellular Representation, Neuronal Segmentation, Fate Prediction

title: LMU Klinikum, TUM, CAMP: 4D Gaussians & Scene Graphs for Surgical Spatial Intelligence
description: 4D surgical video reconstruction with Gaussian Splatting and foundation model embeddings; enables spatial reasoning for autonomous surgery.
keywords: 4D Reconstruction, Surgical Scene Understanding, Scene Graphs, Representation Learning

title: MIT: Ranking-Based Approach for Inorganic Materials Synthesis Planning
description: Retro-Rank-In: ranking framework for inorganic retrosynthesis with state-of-the-art generalization.

title: MIT Neural Prediction of Synthesizability from Phase-Diagram Graphs
description: RetroSynth: graph-of-phases synthesizability prediction that models phase competition with context-aware message passing for higher PR-AUC and better-calibrated lab-ready candidates.
keywords: Graph Neural Networks, Synthesis Prediction, Materials Science
